title: 9 Herbal Creams For Bee Sting
description: Melaleuca alternifolia creams contains compounds like cymene and linalool that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. These properties help reduce swelling and pain at the site of the bee sting. The tea tree oil in the cream, which is the main active constituent, has antimicrobial properties that prevent bacterial infections from developing at the wound.
